title: Amilie's Beautified Minecraft
description: A pack to optimise Minecraft while also making it look beautiful! Comes with multiple mods to make your game more immersive!
body:
Minecraft beautiful AND optimised? NEVER? Well I did it. Minecraft can now look amazing while being optimised to run on some lower end desktops!

Coming with the first person mod you can get a more immersive experience in the game while having pretty shader packs to choose from, OUT OF THE BOX!

For this pack I recommend having at least
- A i5 newer than 2017 or i3 newer than 2022 or AMD Equivalent.
- RTX Series GPU or AMD Equivalent
- Later GTX series GPU's may work but won't perform as well.

Credit to pseudify on Discord for the awesome icon!
